title: The USMLE Step 2 Clinical Skills Patient Note Corpus
citation: Yaneva V, Mee J, Ha L, Harik P, Jodoin M, Mechaber A. The USMLE Step 2 Clinical Skills Patient Note Corpus. NAACL-HLT 2022. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Evidence context for physician-rater scoring of patient notes, rubric concepts, clinical-case features, and automated scoring caution.
claims_supported: The paper describes a corpus of 43,985 Step 2 CS patient notes written by 35,156 examinees.
The paper describes physician raters scoring patient notes using case-specific rubrics of clinical concepts.
The paper notes high accuracy requirements and high societal/personal costs for automated scoring errors.
claims_not_supported: That OpenClinXR can automate scoring safely.
That OpenClinXR has access to the corpus or can recreate confidential exam materials.
